articles.description: Holding, wrestling, battling - call it what you will. Corner kicks in the Premier League are becoming dominated by it. Can anything be done?
articles.title: Premier League corner chaos: How can football's lawmakers sort the issue?

articles.description: BBC Sport looks at how the ongoing conflict in the Middle East is affecting the staging of sporting events around the world.
articles.title: Middle East conflict: How is sport dealing with travel disruption?

articles.description: England have some reasons for hope before their T20 World Cup semi-final against India, but other issues show the difficulty of their task.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Reasons England can beat India - and reasons they won't

articles.description: Ex-England captain Lewis Moody tells former team-mate Ben Youngs he was "very aware" of the risks posed during his career.
articles.title: Lewis Moody: 'I knew the risks in rugby and I'd do it again'

articles.description: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says his "football heart doesn't like" the reliance on set-pieces in this season's Premier League.
articles.title: Arne Slot on set-pieces: Premier League games not a joy to watch

articles.description: Uefa fine Tottenham Hotspur and give them a suspended ban from selling away tickets after three supporters made Nazi salutes towards Eintracht Frankfurt fans.
articles.title: Tottenham fined by Uefa and given suspended ticket ban after fans' Nazi salutes

articles.description: Fast bowler Haris Rauf is put forward as a 'marquee' player in the auction for The Hundred, alongside 13 other men from Pakistan.
articles.title: The Hundred: Haris Rauf leads 14 men on final list for men's auction

articles.description: Leeds United say loud boos during a brief pause in play to allow players observing Ramadan to break their fast in Saturday's Premier League game at Elland Road were "disappointing".
articles.title: Leeds say boos doing Ramadan pause 'disappointing'

articles.description: There is an exponential growth of AI 'slop' involving players and football clubs. Is there anything that can be done to stop it?
articles.title: AI slop: Can players and football clubs do anything about it?

articles.description: As Formula 1 steps into a new era with new rules, cars, engines and the addition of an 11th team, BBC Sport breaks down the changes for 2026.
articles.title: Formula 1 2026: BBC Sport breaks down what is changing in the sport this season
